positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) sitting elegantly on a crescent moon. The fox has flowing, stylized tails and luminous eyes. Style is neo-traditional Japanese woodblock print meets modern kawaii aesthetic. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, glowing gold, jade green, and creamy off-white. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, with the fox occupying the upper two-thirds of the frame for optimal apparel placement. Clean lines, strong, recognizable silhouette, high contrast, intricate patterns (like stylized clouds or geometric mandalas) in the negative space. Flat vector look with engraved detail. Studio lighting, maximum crispness, perfect symmetry, isolated background.
negative: photorealistic, 3d, messy, blurry, noise, grain, text, watermarks, low resolution, artifacts, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, cropped, dirty, busy, cluttered
